creator: kenji.rikitake@acm.org
text:
The Port creates the following three spurious directories
/etc/riak /lib/riak/lib /lib/riak
instead of
/usr/local/etc/riak /usr/local/lib/riak/lib /usr/local/lib/riak
during `make install`, and the install procedures abnormally terminated.

My investigation suggests that the ".for" statement in the target "do-install" in the Makefile does not function properly.

Fix: Apply the patch in this PR.
(The .for loop in the Makefile is manually expanded;
this patch will not add unnecessary complexity
because the .for loop only handles five directories)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: (cd /usr/ports/databases/riak && make && make install)
